_comment: Edit this file to add or modify packs. Then run ./build-packs.sh to regenerate the marketplace. Each pack's skills are COPIED from /skills/** into /plugins/<pack>/skills/. Packs follow two naming conventions: 'utopia-studio-cobuild-<module>' for Studio fellows (mapped to the 9 cobuild modules M1-M9), and 'utopia-funds-<purpose>' for Utopia Capital's internal fund team.

marketplace.name: skills
marketplace.description: Karan Pinto's skill marketplace for Utopia Capital. Two tracks: Studio Cobuild packs (for fellows, mapped to M1-M9 modules) and Funds packs (for internal investment and DD work).

packs.name: utopia-studio-cobuild-onboarding
packs.description: M1 Fellow Onboarding — orientation, market sizing, stakeholder mapping, frameworks for getting started. Install this first when a new fellow joins.

packs.name: utopia-studio-cobuild-discovery
packs.description: M2 Discovery & Problem Validation — customer interviews, JTBD, opportunity solution trees, problem framing, assumption mapping, and first-iteration canvases.

packs.name: utopia-studio-cobuild-concept
packs.description: M3 Concept & Solution Design — turn validated problems into solutions. PRDs, user stories, recommendation canvases, prototyping, early design critiques, and architecture sketches.

packs.name: utopia-studio-cobuild-legal
packs.description: M4 Legal & Entity Setup — NDAs, privacy policies, resume/hiring docs, press release templates. GAP: MENA/GCC jurisdiction-aware cap table and entity setup — build as proprietary Studio skill.

packs.name: utopia-studio-cobuild-brand
packs.description: M5 Brand & Identity — visual identity, brand narrative, naming, voice, and social/graphic design assets. Covers Efecto design, Impeccable, and brand voice frameworks.

packs.name: utopia-studio-cobuild-product
packs.description: M6 Product & Technology — build the actual product. Design polish (Impeccable suite), deployment (Railway, Vercel), production readiness, ML integration, and architecture diagrams. For deep specialization see the Railway, Vercel, or ML-specific skills in the /skills folder.

packs.name: utopia-studio-cobuild-gtm
packs.description: M7 Go-to-Market — positioning, hook, copywriting, content strategy, BD, outbound sales, and distribution. Covers the full launch-to-growth motion for founders.

packs.name: utopia-studio-cobuild-fundraising
packs.description: M8 Fundraising Prep — investor-ready materials. Pitch decks (Utopia-branded for syndication or adapted for portco use), financial models, valuations, competitive analysis, and data packs.

packs.name: utopia-studio-cobuild-ops
packs.description: M9 Operations & Finance — ongoing ops once the business is running. Metrics, unit economics, retention, churn, onboarding CRO, pricing, roadmap, and customer ops for founders scaling retained revenue.

packs.name: utopia-funds-dd
packs.description: Utopia Funds — Technical Due Diligence. Internal skills for evaluating startups before investment: tech stack audits, security review, cost analysis, DB/infra review, and TDD report generation.

packs.name: utopia-funds-finance
packs.description: Utopia Funds — Financial Modeling & IB Toolkit. Internal skills for valuation, deal modeling, comp analysis, earnings analysis, tear sheets, and pitch deck population for the investment team.

packs.name: utopia-funds-markets
packs.description: Utopia Funds — Capital Markets. Public markets and trading skills for fellows transitioning into sell-side roles: bonds, FX, options, swaps, macro rates, equity research. Not for VC workflows.

packs.name: utopia-funds-research
packs.description: Utopia Funds — Research & Knowledge Management. Internal skills for the investment team's research workflow: Obsidian vault management, markdown notes, canvases, web extraction, and papers.
